title: Fingerprint Light Control System
description: ESP32-S3, fingerprint sensor, OLED, DFPlayer Mini, and relay based access control project with visual and audio feedback.
why: Ideal for smart room security, lab access control, and professional electronics demo projects.

title: ESP32 Camera to TFT Display
description: Camera stream sent wirelessly and displayed on TFT LCD, designed for smart monitoring and embedded video interfaces.
why: Strong project for smart surveillance, embedded displays, and camera-based IoT demos.

title: Blynk Controlled 5 DOF Arm
description: A mobile-controlled 5 DOF robotic arm using ESP32, smooth servo motion, and IoT slider control.
why: Perfect for client demos, robotics exhibitions, learning labs, and custom automation concepts.

title: Hydraulic Excavator with ESP32
description: A mini hydraulic excavator system controlled through modern electronics and wireless app-based control.
why: Looks premium, moves impressively, and attracts attention from students and clients immediately.

title: Muscle Controlled Robotic Hand
description: Sensor-driven robotic hand that responds to human muscle activity for a futuristic control experience.
why: Strong final year project category and very eye-catching for demonstrations or social media promotion.

title: Raspberry Pi AI Robot
description: A Raspberry Pi based robot using camera, sensors, Python, and AI-assisted features for smart responses and navigation ideas.
why: Excellent for advanced clients who want AI + robotics integration in one package.
